environment_failures.test: measure records command, HTTP, startup, and Prisma log metrics
npm dry-run package excludes VibePro workspace and internal artifacts
environment_failures.cause: default npm cache contained root-owned files

environment_recheck.command: npm_config_cache=/private/tmp/vibepro-npm-cache node --test --test-name-pattern='measure records command, HTTP, startup, and Prisma log metrics|npm dry-run package excludes VibePro workspace and internal artifacts' test/vibepro-cli.test.js

conclusion: All product tests passed. The two initial failures were environmental and passed unchanged with localhost permission and a writable temporary npm cache.
